mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, assignee_id, assignee_name, assignee_dept_id, assignee_dept_name, assignee_org_id, assignee_org_name, proc_key, `status`, flags, app_key, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, draft_title, form_model_start_url_app, form_model_start_url
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_ru_start_draft (gmt_create, gmt_modified, assignee_id, assignee_name, assignee_dept_id, assignee_dept_name, assignee_org_id, assignee_org_name, proc_key, `status`, flags, app_key, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, draft_title, form_model_start_url_app, form_model_start_url ) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{draftTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formModelStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formModelStartUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update t_wf_ru_start_draft set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_name = #{assigneeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_dept_id = #{assigneeDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_dept_name = #{assigneeDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_org_id = #{assigneeOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_org_name = #{assigneeOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_key = #{procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_form_data_key = #{procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_form_key = #{procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, draft_title = #{draftTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_model_start_url_app = #{formModelStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_model_start_url = #{formModelStartUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_ru_start_draft (gmt_create, gmt_modified, assignee_id, assignee_name, assignee_dept_id, assignee_dept_name, assignee_org_id, assignee_org_name, proc_key, `status`, flags, app_key, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, draft_title, form_model_start_url_app, form_model_start_url) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.draftTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formModelStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formModelStartUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select count(*) from t_wf_ru_start_draft
and draft_title like concat('%', #{draftTitle,jdbcType=BIGINT}, '%')
